Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A hand presses a floral patterned rectangular object onto a red cutting board. Small white and purple circular cutouts lie near the bottom right edge. A pink sticky note and white pen appear on the table surface. Purple scissors are positioned vertically to the right of the cutting board.

question: Describe the sequence of events and objects shown from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a girl waves near a white door; at 10s, a red cutting board with tools appears on a table; at 12s, a clear plastic ring becomes visible on the board; at 14s, three small cut-out shapes appear near the bottom; at 18s, hands hold a floral tape roll over the board.

question: Walk through the changes observed on the red cutting board throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 10s, scissors with purple handles and a silver knife rest on the board; at 12s, a patterned tape roll stands upright on the right side; at 14s, three small cut-out shapes appear near the bottom center; at 18s, hands actively turn a floral duct tape roll above the surface.
